contact me

AI Assistant Hub

Cloud & AI — (Angular / Azure)

Professional AI interface developed as a highly portable Web Component for corporate environments. I led the frontend architecture, focusing on seamless integration with cloud-based AI services.

Key Contributions:
• Multi-modal Features: Implemented advanced AI capabilities including Speech-to-Text for real-time transcription and a PDF processing engine for automated text extraction.
• Scalability: Developed as a reusable Web Component, facilitating deployment across various platforms, specifically WordPress.
• Technical Leadership: Responsible for comprehensive technical documentation and video tutorials for corporate onboarding, ensuring a successful handover.
• Cloud Architecture: Optimized communication with Azure Cognitive Services to ensure low-latency responses and a fluid experience.

SCREENSHOTS

— Howard Thurman (Author & Educator, Harvard)
